description: An MRO planner needs to schedule an engine for a complete overhaul based on its accumulated flight hours.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the engine's maintenance history and current flight hours to confirm it is due for an overhaul.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the engine has exceeded the threshold for a scheduled overhaul.

nodes.task_description: Check the MRO facility's capacity and schedule the engine for an available slot.

expected_outcome.value: Agent books a slot for the engine overhaul in the MRO schedule.

nodes.task_description: Create a work package for the overhaul, including all required service bulletins and airworthiness directives.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a complete and compliant work package for the technicians.
